wiki.summary: "Do It" is a song by underscores that serves as the second single from her upcoming third studio album, released by Mom+Pop Music on November 4, 2025. In this song, underscores highlights the importance of anonymity amongst choosing a romantic partner as to protect her public image. In a song review, Pitchforks says that it "takes late-2000s Britney, fuses it with 2nd-generation K-pop’s electro-pop maximalism, and throws in the industrial verve of Jam City’s Classical Curves. It’s an ingenious lesson in pop theatrics." Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "Do It" is a song by underscores that serves as the second single from her upcoming third studio album, released by Mom+Pop Music on November 4, 2025. In this song, underscores highlights the importance of anonymity amongst choosing a romantic partner as to protect her public image. In a song review, Pitchforks says that it "takes late-2000s Britney, fuses it with 2nd-generation K-pop’s electro-pop maximalism, and throws in the industrial verve of Jam City’s Classical Curves. It’s an ingenious lesson in pop theatrics." The song was previewed at Circus Tokyo on October 3, a month before the single was officially released. Read more on Last.fm.
